title: Adjustments in the supplementary tax return 2023
description: Instructions for completing adjustments in the supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, adjustments, supplementary, 2023, tax return, family trust, family trust distribution, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Before you can complete this question, you will need to know if you need to lodge a supplementary tax return. See, Will you need the Individual tax return instructions supplement 2023?
If a trust, partnership or company made a distribution to you on which family trust distribution tax has been paid, you must complete question A5 .
If you made certain tax-related payments to us more than 14 days before the due date, you must complete question C1 .
Did you receive a distribution during 2022–23 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?

rows: Read question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2023 . You may be entitled to an adjustment.

items: Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2023 .
Go back to question Private health insurance policy details 2023 .

content_text:
## Things you need to know
Before you can complete this question, you will need to know if you need to lodge a supplementary tax return. See, Will you need the Individual tax return instructions supplement 2023?
If a trust, partnership or company made a distribution to you on which family trust distribution tax has been paid, you must complete question A5 .
If you made certain tax-related payments to us more than 14 days before the due date, you must complete question C1 .
## Completing your tax return
Did you receive a distribution during 2022–23 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?
Yes | Read question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2023 . You may be entitled to an adjustment.
No | See Where to go next .
## Where to go next
- Go to question A1 Under 18 2023 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2023 .
- Go back to question Private health insurance policy details 2023 .
